content.verdict: Matemwe Retreat is an &Beyond exclusive-use collection of just four private villas on Zanzibar's northeast coast — quite possibly the most intimate land-based honeymoon experience on the island short of Mnemba. Each villa comes with a dedicated personal butler, private pool, and direct access to a pristine stretch of beach facing Mnemba Atoll. The all-inclusive pricing and exceptional diving proximity to the Mnemba marine reserve make it an extraordinary choice for couples who want complete seclusion without the price tag of a private island.
content.best_room: Matemwe Retreat operates as four individual villas, each of which can be booked independently or as an exclusive-use retreat. The Ocean Villa is the flagship — positioned on a cliff edge above the beach with the most dramatic view of Mnemba Atoll, a private infinity pool that appears to merge with the Indian Ocean, and the most spacious outdoor terrace in the property. All villas include a personal butler, outdoor shower, and handcrafted Swahili furniture.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Butler Introduction
itinerary_7_nights.description: Your butler meets you at the property entrance and remains at your disposal for the entire stay — learning your preferences from the first evening and subtly adjusting every element of your experience accordingly. Dinner on your private villa terrace, with fresh lobster from the morning's catch and cold sparkling wine, sets a very high bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Mnemba Atoll Snorkel & Dive
itinerary_7_nights.description: Matemwe Retreat sits closer to Mnemba Atoll than any other land-based property in Zanzibar — a 20-minute boat ride puts you directly on the world-class reef. Your personal guide takes you to snorkel or dive sites where turtles, reef sharks, eagle rays, and vast schools of tropical fish are routine encounters. This is a truly world-class marine experience.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Couples' Spa by the Pool
itinerary_7_nights.description: The retreat's spa team sets up a private treatment area beside your villa pool — a coconut and ylang ylang body scrub followed by a two-hour hot stone massage, with the Indian Ocean breeze completing the experience. Spend the afternoon in your hammock with the butler delivering fresh juices and local snacks at regular intervals.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Traditional Dhow Safari
itinerary_7_nights.description: An &Beyond signature experience — a full day on a traditional sailing dhow navigating the northeast coast, with snorkelling stops at pristine outer reef sites, a beach picnic on a sandbank, and the chance to help crew the vessel if you choose. The butler prepares a custom hamper including chilled Champagne, fresh seafood, and tropical fruits.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Village Walk & Spice Cooking
itinerary_7_nights.description: A morning walk through the village of Matemwe with a local guide introduces you to the daily life of northeast Zanzibar — the dhow builders, the seaweed farmers, the mosque at prayer time. Return for an afternoon Swahili cooking lesson with the retreat's chef, preparing the evening meal together in the villa kitchen.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sunrise Kayak & Sundowner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Before the day heats up, kayak through the calm lagoon to the edge of the reef flat — the light at sunrise on the northeast coast is extraordinary, with Mnemba Island visible as a low green horizon. Your butler arranges a spectacular sundowner set-up on the beach at dusk: two chairs, a fire pit, local craft beer and wine, and complete silence.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Final Morning & Leisurely Departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Your butler serves breakfast on the villa terrace at any hour you choose — fresh-squeezed passion fruit juice, Zanzibar coffee, and the retreat's signature spiced flatbread. Late checkout is standard at the retreat and genuinely unhurried. The &Beyond team at Mnemba Island, visible from your terrace all week, is a tempting upgrade for a future trip.

caveats: Just four villas means availability is very limited, particularly in peak season (July–August, December–January) — book six to twelve months ahead.
The northeast coast is not adults-only, and all four villas can theoretically be occupied by different groups; if exclusivity is important, enquire about booking all four as an exclusive retreat.

There is no large pool or resort-style facilities — this is a villa retreat, not a full-service resort; for couples who want daily spa menus, multiple restaurants, and gym access, Baraza or The Residence may be better fits.

faqs.question: Is Matemwe Retreat good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Matemwe Retreat is one of the most romantic properties in East Africa — the combination of personal butler service, proximity to Mnemba Atoll's world-class marine life, and an intimate four-villa setting creates an experience that is difficult to replicate. &Beyond's conservation ethos also means the wider natural environment that frames your honeymoon is actively protected and thriving.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: June through October is ideal — the northeast coast is in its dry season, the trade winds keep temperatures comfortable, and visibility for diving and snorkeling at Mnemba is at its peak. The whale shark season at Mnemba runs October through March, which is also excellent. Avoid April and May.

faqs.question: What should we book in advance?
faqs.answer: Book the villa as far ahead as possible given the four-villa limit. Pre-arrange the dhow safari, any PADI dive days, and inform &Beyond reservations of your honeymoon at booking time — the retreat team can arrange extraordinary touches like a private fire dinner on the beach or floating breakfast in your pool.

faqs.question: Is it adults-only?
faqs.answer: Matemwe Retreat is not officially adults-only — families can and do book individual villas. However, the high price point, absence of children's facilities, and focus on ocean activities naturally skews the guest profile toward couples. If absolute privacy from other guests is important, enquire about exclusive use of all four villas.

faqs.question: What's the best room type for a honeymoon?
faqs.answer: The Ocean Villa, perched on the clifftop with an infinity pool overlooking Mnemba Atoll, is the finest choice — the view is extraordinary and the privacy complete. If budget is a consideration, the Beach Villa is equally romantic with more immediate sand access.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Fly to Zanzibar International Airport (ZNZ). The retreat is on the northeast coast near Matemwe village, approximately 45 minutes from the airport. &Beyond arranges all transfers, and the drive north along the island's eastern ridge is scenic and relaxing.

content.email_template:

My partner and I are planning our honeymoon and are very interested in staying with you from [DATE] to [DATE] ([X] nights).

We are particularly interested in: the Ocean Villa and the traditional dhow safari experience.

Could you please let us know:

- Any honeymoon enhancements or complimentary touches
